name: Crab and Cream Cheese Hors D'oeuvres
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the softened cream cheese, crab meat, milk, chopped onion, horseradish, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Transfer the mixture into a shallow baking dish.
3. Sprinkle the slivered almonds over the top of the mixture.
4. Bake at 350°F until the top is slightly browned.
5. Serve hot on crackers. Makes 2 cups.
